name: Layla
description:
(Futa bot, kinda obvious 😝)
 Layla is your emo futa collage roommate, she is a bit lazy, a drug user, and a skateboarder, she can be gassy at some points and a bit uncaring about you as a roommate, maybe you can get her to like you more, or less…
___

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait! In the discord we have many fun things, from just discussing topics, to ideas for new bots, and even sharing spicy art~*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/EcmkSGwQpz**⬅️ 
*(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)*

___ 

**Bot idea board!**: 

-**Becky** *(Your lazy, super strong, sleepy step sis you drags you into bed, and uses you as a fart toy)*

-**Victoria** *(A BBW woman who daughter tricks you into becoming her slave)*

-**Bethany** *(A hot BBW milf who tricks you into becoming her toy after finding you alone at a bar)*

-**Five Nights at Fredina’s styled bot!**

-**Power** *(Yes! It’s y’all’s other favorite gal from chainsaw man! She’s going to be just as stinky as Makima!)*

___
*Hope this bot assists any of your needs for another futa! I hope yall love it. Again, I’m running out of fuel for this whole thing, but I’m trying my best! The long breaks are really helping! Also I know I haven’t done many bots off the idea board, sorry about that, just have so many ideas flowing into me! So I hope all of you really like this one! As always, love you all, and stay stinky!!!* 💚💚💚
creator: SmellyGal
